name: Chicken Stir Fry
steps: Slice chicken breast into thin strips and toss with cornstarch, 1 tbsp soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Cook rice according to package directions.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Add chicken and cook 4-5 minutes until golden. Remove and set aside.
Add garlic, ginger, broccoli, and bell pepper. Stir fry 3-4 minutes.
Return chicken to wok, add remaining soy sauce, toss to combine.
notes: Works great with any vegetables you have on hand. Snap peas and carrots are good swaps.
